items.title_en: CoreWeave revenue more than doubles in first quarter, topping estimates
items.title_zh: CoreWeave 第一季度收入增长一倍以上，超出预期
items.desc_en: CoreWeave has been raising billions of dollars in debt to finance its data center buildout as it serves the leading AI companies.
items.desc_zh: CoreWeave 一直在筹集数十亿美元的债务，为其数据中心建设提供资金，为领先的人工智能公司提供服务。

items.title_en: Airbnb tops revenue estimates, but Middle East cancellations rise due to Iran war
items.title_zh: Airbnb 营收超出预期，但中东地区取消订单因伊朗战争而增加
items.desc_en: Airbnb reported mixed first-quarter results after the bell on Thursday and warned of regional weakness due to the war in Iran.
items.desc_zh: 周四盘后，Airbnb 公布的第一季度业绩好坏参半，并警告称，伊朗战争导致该地区经济疲软。

items.title_en: Valverde taken to hospital after alleged incident with Tchouameni
items.title_zh: 巴尔韦德因涉嫌与楚阿梅尼发生事件而被送往医院
items.desc_en: An incident involving team-mates Federico Valverde and Aurelien Tchouameni threatens to overshadow one of Real Madrid's biggest matches of the season.
items.desc_zh: 涉及队友费德里科·巴尔韦德和奥雷利安·楚阿梅尼的事件可能会给皇马本赛季最重要的比赛之一蒙上阴影。

items.title_en: How operation to disembark passengers on virus-hit cruise will work
items.title_zh: 受病毒感染的游轮上的乘客下船操作将如何进行
items.desc_en: The BBC's Guy Hedgecoe reports from Tenerife, where some locals fear the ship's arrival could bring health risks.
items.desc_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 的盖伊·赫奇科 (Guy Hedgecoe) 从特内里费岛报道，当地一些当地人担心这艘船的抵达可能会带来健康风险。

items.title_en: Here's how the stock market may trade the April jobs report, according to JPMorgan
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，股市可能如何交易四月份就业报告
items.desc_en: JPMorgan has a list of potential outcomes for the market, depending on what the critically important payroll report shows.
items.desc_zh: 摩根大通列出了市场的潜在结果，具体取决于至关重要的薪资报告显示的内容。

items.title_en: Iran still reviewing new U.S. peace proposal as Trump predicts war will 'be over quickly': Reports
items.title_zh: 特朗普预测战争将“很快结束”，伊朗仍在审查美国新的和平提议：报告
items.desc_en: Senior Iranian official Mohsen Rezaee reportedly said Tehran would not let the U.S. reopen the Strait of Hormuz with "an unrealistic plan."
items.desc_zh: 据报道，伊朗高级官员穆赫森·雷扎伊表示，德黑兰不会让美国以“不切实际的计划”重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。

items.title_en: These banks just raised their CD rates. Where to find the highest yields
items.title_zh: 这些银行刚刚提高了存款利率。哪里可以找到最高产量
items.desc_en: Morgan Stanley expects rates on certificates of deposit to be flat to slightly higher in the near term.
items.desc_zh: 摩根士丹利预计短期内存款证利率将持平或略高。

items.title_en: Shell CEO says oil market is short nearly 1 billion barrels due to Iran war and the hole deepens every day
items.title_zh: 壳牌CEO称伊朗战争导致石油市场短缺近10亿桶且缺口日益加深
items.desc_en: The Strait of Hormuz remains closed as the oil market hopes the U.S. and Iran will strike a deal that could restore energy shipments.
items.desc_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡仍然关闭，石油市场希望美国和伊朗能够达成协议，恢复能源运输。

items.title_zh: 以下是周五发布的四月就业报告的预期

items.desc_zh: 总体情况是，劳动力市场虽然无疑正在降温，但尽管面临许多挑战，但总体稳定且富有弹性。

items.title_en: Rwandan singer dies as he was being released from prison
items.title_zh: 卢旺达歌手在出狱时去世
items.desc_en: The former university lecturer was a vocal critic of the government and ruling Rwandan Patriotic Front party.
items.desc_zh: 这位前大学讲师是政府和执政的卢旺达爱国阵线党的直言不讳的批评者。

items.title_en: Rosenberg: Russia's Victory Day parade with no tanks a sign Ukraine war not going to plan
items.title_zh: 罗森伯格：俄罗斯没有坦克的胜利日阅兵表明乌克兰战争不会计划
items.desc_en: For the first time in nearly two decades, there will be no military hardware, just soldiers during Saturday's parade in Moscow.
items.desc_zh: 周六在莫斯科举行的阅兵式上，近二十年来第一次，将没有任何军事装备，只有士兵。

items.title_en: Paul Tudor Jones says U.S. is late to regulating AI: 'We should have already done it'
items.title_zh: 保罗·都铎·琼斯 (Paul Tudor Jones) 表示美国在监管人工智能方面姗姗来迟：“我们应该已经这么做了”
items.desc_en: The U.S. is locked into a heated rivalry with China and a race to lead AI innovation.
items.desc_zh: 美国与中国陷入了激烈的竞争，并展开了引领人工智能创新的竞赛。

items.title_en: Boeing CEO Kelly Ortberg set to join Trump on China visit next week
items.title_zh: 波音公司首席执行官凯利·奥特伯格将于下周与特朗普一起访华
items.desc_en: Boeing CEO Kelly Ortberg is expected to join President Donald Trump on his visit to China next week, a source familiar with the planemaker's plans told CNBC.
items.desc_zh: 一位熟悉波音公司计划的消息人士告诉 CNBC，波音公司首席执行官凯利·奥特伯格预计将于下周与唐纳德·特朗普总统一起访问中国。

items.title_en: Ryan Cohen's mysterious bank letter backing GameStop's eBay bid reveals a big issue with deal
items.title_zh: 瑞安·科恩（Ryan Cohen）神秘的银行信件支持 GameStop 收购 eBay，揭示了交易中的一个大问题
items.desc_en: The combined company would need to maintain an investment-grade credit profile, GameStop's mysterious financing letter said.
items.desc_zh: GameStop 神秘的融资信称，合并后的公司需要保持投资级信用状况。

items.title_en: OpenAI trial: Mother of Musk's children says he offered Altman a Tesla board seat

items.desc_zh: 前 OpenAI 董事会成员 Shivon Zilis 与马斯克育有四个孩子，他作证说特斯拉首席执行官希望这家人工智能初创公司加入他的电动汽车公司。

items.desc_zh: 此前，中国军方几名高级官员最近被罢黜。

items.title_en: DR Congo president hints at extending his term and delaying polls
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国总统暗示延长任期并推迟投票
items.desc_en: "If the people want me to have a third term, I will accept," Tshisekedi says, with him due to step down in 2028.
